summary: Iteration 52: Amazon History Orders Dispatch Workflow fully verified. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Items display with product name/SKU/mapped status, Sync button for orders without items, Process in CRM dialog with all required fields, Pending Fulfillment queue with workflow instructions.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning)

critical_code_review_comments: refresh_amazon_order_items endpoint (server.py ~20485): Correctly fetches items from Amazon API and updates order with master_sku_id mappings
update_amazon_tracking endpoint (server.py ~20605): Properly validates customer details for history orders, creates pending_fulfillment entry with master_sku_id
mark_pending_fulfillment_ready endpoint (server.py ~11863): Correctly checks stock via get_current_stock() and updates status to ready_to_dispatch

dispatch_pending_fulfillment endpoint (server.py ~11651): Creates dispatch entry with state/city/pincode, creates sales_order with order_source='amazon', creates inventory_ledger entry for stock deduction, updates amazon_orders.crm_status to 'dispatched'
create_sales_order_from_dispatch (server.py ~3849): Properly captures state, city, pincode for state-wise sales reporting
Frontend AmazonOrders.jsx: Items column shows product name, SKU badge (green for mapped, red for unmapped), Sync button for orders without items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Amazon History Orders Dispatch Workflow verified working: 1) Items display in Amazon History tab shows product name, SKU, mapped/unmapped status. 2) Sync button appears for orders with no items - calls refresh-order-items API. 3) Process in CRM dialog has all required fields (Carrier, Tracking, Customer Name, Phone, Address, City, State, Pincode). 4) Pending Fulfillment queue shows workflow: Pending → Ready → Dispatch. 5) Mark Ready checks stock availability. 6) Dispatch creates: dispatch entry with state/city/pincode, sales_order with order_source='amazon', inventory_ledger entry for stock deduction, updates amazon_orders.crm_status to 'dispatched'.

Backend API Tests.POST /api/amazon/refresh-order-items/{am: PASS - Endpoint exists and validates input
Backend API Tests.GET /api/pending-fulfillment: PASS - Returns entries with master_sku_id, status, customer details
Backend API Tests.PUT /api/pending-fulfillment/{id}/mark-r: PASS - Validates fulfillment ID, checks stock
Backend API Tests.GET /api/sales-orders: PASS - Returns sales orders with order_source field
Backend API Tests.GET /api/inventory/ledger: PASS - Returns ledger entries with dispatch_out type
Backend API Tests.POST /api/amazon/update-tracking: PASS - Validates customer details for history orders

Frontend UI Tests.Amazon Orders Page: PASS - Loads correctly with firm selector
Frontend UI Tests.Stats Cards: PASS - Shows Total Orders (111), MFN Pending (31), Easy Ship (20), Tracking Added (3), Dispatched (0), Amazon History (57)
Frontend UI Tests.Amazon History Tab: PASS - Shows 57 orders with 'Amazon Shipped' status
Frontend UI Tests.Items Column: PASS - Shows product name, SKU badge (green=mapped, red=unmapped)
Frontend UI Tests.Sync Button: PASS - 43 Sync buttons found for orders without items
Frontend UI Tests.Process in CRM Button: PASS - 48 buttons found for history orders
Frontend UI Tests.Process in CRM Dialog: PASS - Contains all required fields: Carrier, Tracking Number, Customer Name, Phone (10 digits), Shipping Address, City, State, Pincode
Frontend UI Tests.Historical Order Reconciliation Header: PASS - Shows 'Amazon History' badge in dialog
Frontend UI Tests.Fetch History Section: PASS - Date picker shows '01 Apr 2026', Fetch History button present
Frontend UI Tests.Pending Fulfillment Queue: PASS - Shows 7 entries, tabs: Pending (5), Ready to Dispatch (1), Dispatched, All
Frontend UI Tests.Workflow Instructions: PASS - Shows 'Workflow: Pending → Ready → Dispatch' with clear steps

workflow_steps: 1. Amazon History tab shows orders with crm_status='amazon_shipped'
2. Items column shows product name, SKU, mapped/unmapped status
3. Sync button for orders without items calls refresh-order-items API
4. Process in CRM button opens dialog with customer details fields
5. Processing creates pending_fulfillment entry with master_sku_id
6. Mark Ready checks stock and updates status to ready_to_dispatch
7. Dispatch creates: dispatch entry, sales_order, inventory_ledger entry
